KRACK with KAVYA
One-time Firebase setup — free, 5 minutes
1
Create a Firebase project
Go to console.firebase.google.com → Add project → Name it "kwk-tracker" → Disable Analytics → Create project
2
Enable Firestore database
Build → Firestore Database → Create database → Start in test mode → Region: asia-south1 → Enable
3
Get app config keys
Settings ⚙️ → General → scroll to "Your apps" → click </> → Register app → copy the config values below

Saved only in your browser
